utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: 1) health_coverage is present with physical and mental health insurance and costs, including a total — fully specified. 2) property_coverage is present with plan name, addon, and a cost breakdown including totals — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage is present but says 'Not included in Option A' and does not provide costs — not fully specified per the required 'with costs'. 4) additional_services are listed but no costs are provided — not fully specified per the required 'with costs'. 5) total_budget is present with monthly and annual totals — fully specified. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health at €100/month, which maps to 'primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan' with rating 9. (2) LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health at €65/month, which maps to 'primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan' with rating 9. (3) HomeFirst Standard Coverage for property, which maps to 'property_protection.home_content -> HomeFirst Standard Coverage' with rating 8. (4) An 'Equipment Enhancement Add-on' is mentioned, but no exact matching add-on item exists in the ground-truth ratings; thus no rating can be mapped for it. (5) Travel coverage is explicitly not included, so nothing to map there. Additional services listed (expedited claims processing, smart home integration discounts, dedicated emergency support, tailored coverage limits) do not directly match any named items with ratings in the ground-truth. Therefore, only the three mapped items receive ratings.
